_patch_meta.description: Verse context classification — VCB-030, H7965I sha.lom (peace: well-being), mti=2509, R117, 46 verses. FRESH term — shalom reinstated 2026-05-01.

record.context_description: Term names shalom as the comprehensive inner condition of welfare and well-being — the wholeness of the person as divinely given, sustained, or promised

operations.description: New group for H7965I: shalom as inner condition of welfare and well-being

record.context_description: Term names shalom as the falsely promised or self-deceived condition of welfare — the inner state wrongly claimed when judgment or correction is the reality

operations.description: New group for H7965I: shalom as falsely promised welfare
Gen 29:6 — set aside: social welfare enquiry formula
Gen 37:14 — set aside: welfare check formula
Gen 43:27 — set aside: social welfare enquiry
Gen 43:28 — set aside: report of welfare, external
Exo 18:7 — set aside: mutual welfare enquiry formula

record.notes: Blesses himself in his heart saying 'I shall be safe' while walking in stubbornness of heart — sha.lom claimed by the self-deceived heart; the false inner assurance of welfare accompanying covenant violation.

operations.description: Deu 29:19 — ANCHOR, group 2509-002: self-deceived heart claiming safety
Jos 10:21 — set aside: physical safety after battle
Judg 18:15 — set aside: social welfare enquiry
1Sa 17:18 — set aside: welfare check
1Sa 20:7 — set aside: welfare/safety conditional, external outcome
1Sa 20:13 — set aside: physical safety
1Sa 20:21 — set aside: external physical safety
2Sa 8:10 — set aside: health inquiry, social/diplomatic
2Sa 18:28 — set aside: report formula
2Sa 18:29 — set aside: welfare enquiry
2Sa 18:32 — set aside: welfare enquiry
2Sa 19:24 — set aside: physical return safely
2Sa 19:30 — set aside: physical return
2Sa 20:9 — set aside: social welfare enquiry

record.notes: Shunammite's concealment is inner-being, but sha.lom itself is the social formula here, not the inner-being carrier.

operations.description: 2Ki 4:23 — set aside: social reassurance formula
2Ki 4:26 — set aside: welfare enquiry cluster
2Ki 5:21 — set aside: enquiry formula

record.notes: Gehazi's deception is inner-being but sha.lom is the formula, not the carrier of his deceit.

operations.description: 2Ki 5:22 — set aside: sha.lom as formula, deception carried by lie not sha.lom
2Ki 9:11 — set aside: enquiry formula
1Ch 18:10 — set aside: parallel to 2Sa 8:10, health enquiry
2Ch 19:1 — set aside: physical return safely

record.notes: In prosperity the destroyer will come — sha.lom-prosperity as the illusory condition of the wicked before destruction.

operations.description: Job 15:21 — related, group 2509-002: illusory prosperity of the wicked

record.notes: Houses safe from fear, no rod of God — the welfare-condition of the wicked observed; inner content: the absence of fear and divine discipline.

operations.description: Job 21:9 — related, group 2509-001: welfare/safety observed in the wicked

record.notes: Lord delights in the welfare of his servant — God's inner orientation toward his servant's comprehensive welfare; sha.lom as the object of divine delight.

operations.description: Psa 35:27 — ANCHOR, group 2509-001: Lord delights in welfare of his servant

record.notes: No health in my bones because of sin — sha.lom-soundness absent as somatic consequence of sin; welfare/wholeness broken by inner disorder.

operations.description: Psa 38:3 — related, group 2509-001: absence of soundness as consequence of sin

record.notes: He redeems my soul in safety — sha.lom-safety as the condition of the soul (nephesh) under divine redemption.

operations.description: Psa 55:18 — related, group 2509-001: soul redeemed in safety

record.notes: Mountains bearing prosperity for the people — eschatological covenant welfare.

operations.description: Psa 72:3 — related, group 2509-001: eschatological covenant prosperity

record.notes: Psalmist envious of the arrogant when he saw the prosperity of the wicked — inner-being engagement through envy provoked by observing sha.lom-prosperity.

operations.description: Psa 73:3 — related, group 2509-001: envy provoked by prosperity of the wicked

record.notes: For my welfare I had great bitterness; in love you delivered my life — sha.lom achieved paradoxically through suffering and divine love.

operations.description: Isa 38:17 — related, group 2509-001: welfare through suffering and divine love
Isa 41:3 — set aside: military passing safely, external

record.notes: I make well-being and create calamity — God as sovereign creator of sha.lom and its opposite; comprehensive welfare as divine creation.

operations.description: Isa 45:7 — related, group 2509-001: God as creator of well-being

record.notes: Prophets said 'It shall be well with you' while the sword reached their very life (nephesh) — false promise of welfare reaching the inner person.

operations.description: Jer 4:10 — related, group 2509-002: false prophecy of welfare reaching the nephesh
Jer 12:5 — set aside: safe land = external safety of terrain
Jer 15:5 — set aside: welfare enquiry in lament, social formula

record.notes: It shall be well with you to everyone who stubbornly follows his own heart — false welfare promise to the stubborn-hearted; parallel to Deu 29:19.

operations.description: Jer 23:17 — related, group 2509-002: false welfare promised to the stubborn-hearted

record.notes: Seek the welfare of the city; in its welfare you will find your welfare — active orientation toward sha.lom; welfare is participatory and shared.

operations.description: Jer 29:7 — related, group 2509-001: seeking welfare as active orientation

record.notes: Plans for welfare and not for evil, to give you a future and a hope — divine purposive orientation toward the comprehensive welfare of his people.

operations.description: Jer 29:11 — ANCHOR, group 2509-001: divine plans for welfare, future, and hope

record.notes: I will reveal to them abundance of prosperity and security — God revealing sha.lom-prosperity.

operations.description: Jer 33:6 — related, group 2509-001: God revealing abundance of prosperity

record.notes: All the prosperity I provide for it — God providing sha.lom-prosperity for Jerusalem.

operations.description: Jer 33:9 — related, group 2509-001: God providing prosperity for Jerusalem

record.notes: This man is not seeking the welfare of this people, but their harm — inner orientation of seeking sha.lom contrasted with seeking harm.

operations.description: Jer 38:4 — related, group 2509-001: seeking welfare as inner orientation
Zec 8:10 — set aside: external physical safety from foe
